full_content:
Batch formalization: Session governance directives and principles are mapped to MemBase records and audit evidence.

Artifacts to create:
- GOV-RELEASE-READINESS-GOVERNED-TESTING-001 for DELIB-0828 release-readiness testing/governance approval.
- GOV-GTKB-ADOPTION-ENFORCEMENT-001 for DELIB-0829 GT-KB adoption and candidate work queue directive.
- GOV-ACTING-PRIME-BUILDER-001 for DELIB-0830 acting Prime Builder role assignment while canonical Prime is unavailable.
- GOV-HARNESS-ROLE-PORTABILITY-001 for DELIB-0831 portable harness-assigned role principle.
- GOV-GTKB-MULTI-HARNESS-ROLE-CONFIG-001 for DELIB-0832/0833 GT-KB install and harness role configuration principle/comparison.
- GOV-AGENT-RED-GTKB-CONFORMANCE-001 for DELIB-0834 Agent Red as a fully-conformant GT-KB-supported application.
- ADR-CODEX-HOOK-PARITY-FALLBACK-001 for DELIB-0836 Codex hook Windows limitation and fallback verifier/release-gate architecture.
- GOV-SESSION-FORMALIZATION-AUDIT-001 and DELIB-0837 for this audit pass requiring all decisions, directives, and principles in the session to be identified and mapped to their respective artifacts.

The batch also updates .claude/rules/acting-prime-builder.md, memory/work_list.md, and governance regression tests so drift is observable.
explicit_change_request: Owner said: Please ensure that all decisions, directives and principles in this session have been identified and applied to their respective artifacts.
change_reason: Formalize and audit all session governance directives across DA, MemBase, rules, work queue, and tests.
